project: Forge: AI-powered project management with issue tracking, agent execution, and multi-client support
architecture: Web/Desktop UIs → Strapi REST API + WebSocket → DB. Strapi runs AI agents via Claude CLI or cloud APIs. MCP server wraps Strapi for external Claude sessions.

conventions.naming: kebab-case dirs, camelCase TS, snake_case Rust. Feature-based organization in web/dev.
conventions.api: Strapi v5 document service. REST at /api/<plural>. Bearer token auth. WebSocket at /ws for real-time.
conventions.state: React Query for server state (web/dev). Zustand for client state (dev). Strapi lifecycles for cascading updates.

recipes.new-endpoint: 1) Create strapi/src/api/{name}/ with content-types/controllers/routes/services. 2) Register permissions in bootstrap. 3) Add WS broadcast if needed.
recipes.new-page-web: 1) Create web/src/app/(protected)/{path}/page.tsx. 2) Add feature module in web/src/features/{name}/ with api.ts, types.ts, hooks/.
recipes.new-agent-tool: 1) Add tool in strapi/src/services/agent/tools.ts. 2) Mirror in mcp/src/tools.ts for parity.

commands.dev-desktop: cd dev && npm run tauri dev
